prompt_config.theme: Renaissance Florence 1504 - Cradle of the Renaissance
prompt_config.photography_style: National Geographic quality, historical documentary style
prompt_config.artistic_influence: Leonardo da Vinci sfumato, Botticelli elegance

main_prompt: Cinematic travel photography of Renaissance Florence 1504, 1:1 square format for Instagram, luxury campaign style, golden hour Tuscan lighting, the magnificent Duomo with Brunelleschi's dome in red terracotta and polychrome marble centered majestically, or Palazzo Vecchio with David statue, elegant Renaissance citizens in 1504 fashion, women in velvet gowns with slashed sleeves, men in doublets and hose, ochre-yellow buildings with pietra serena stone, professional color grading with Tuscan palette, shot on medium format camera with beautiful depth of field, Leonardo sfumato atmospheric perspective, National Geographic quality, aspirational cultural mood, authentic historical accuracy, vibrant Renaissance colors, 8K ultra detailed, square composition perfect for Instagram, luxury cultural travel aesthetic

composition_notes.instagram_optimization: Square 1:1 format for maximum Instagram impact, centered Renaissance architecture or portrait-style figures in period costume
framing_options: Option 1: Duomo with Brunelleschi's dome centered vertically, Renaissance figures in foreground, architectural masterpiece
Option 2: Piazza della Signoria with Palazzo Vecchio and David statue, balanced square composition
Option 3: Close Renaissance portrait-style of elegant woman in 1504 velvet gown with Florence architecture behind
Option 4: Ponte Vecchio bridge symmetrically framed with Arno river and medieval shops

architecture_square.duomo: Magnificent dome in red terracotta tiles, polychrome marble facade (white, green, pink), perfect for centered square composition
architecture_square.palazzo_vecchio: Crenellated ochre-brown fortress with tall tower, David statue at entrance, imposing presence
architecture_square.typical_buildings: Ochre-yellow stucco buildings, pietra serena grey stone details, terracotta roofs, Renaissance proportions

fashion_1504.women: Rich velvet gowns, high waist, square necklines, slashed sleeves with white chemise showing, elaborate embroidery, crimson red deep blue green golds, pearl nets in hair
fashion_1504.men: Fitted doublets, bicolor striped hose, flat felt hats, velvet bonnets, elegant Renaissance silhouette

tuscan_colors.grading: Renaissance oil painting aesthetic, warm golden tones, sophisticated earth palette

golden_hour_square.lighting: Warm Tuscan golden hour, soft directional light, chiaroscuro contrast, atmospheric sfumato haze
golden_hour_square.atmosphere: Dusty workshop air, marble dust, warm romantic glow, painterly quality

negative_prompt: modern elements, contemporary clothing, cars, modern buildings, anachronistic architecture, baroque, incorrect fashion, gothic only, harsh flash, flat lighting, oversaturated digital, wrong period, plastic, modern tourism, incorrect Duomo colors, modern Ponte Vecchio, grass in piazzas, modern lamps, power lines, graffiti, horizontal composition, stretched image
complete_prompt_string: Cinematic luxury travel photography of Renaissance Florence 1504, 1:1 square Instagram format, golden hour Tuscan lighting casting warm amber glow, magnificent Duomo of Santa Maria del Fiore with Brunelleschi's dome in red terracotta tiles and polychrome marble facade (white green pink) centered in composition, OR Palazzo Vecchio crenellated fortress with Michelangelo's David statue at entrance, elegant Renaissance citizens in authentic 1504 fashion, women in rich velvet gowns with high waists square necklines slashed sleeves showing white chemise, elaborate gold embroidery, crimson red deep blue forest green, pearl nets in elaborate hair, men in fitted doublets over bicolor striped hose with flat felt hats, ochre-yellow stucco buildings with pietra serena grey stone columns and arches, terracotta roofs, professional color grading with Tuscan Renaissance palette, ochre yellow terra di Siena crimson olive green ultramarine blue, shot on medium format camera with beautiful depth of field, Leonardo da Vinci sfumato soft atmospheric edges, chiaroscuro lighting, marble dust in air, warm golden painterly quality, National Geographic quality editorial, aspirational cultural mood, authentic historical accuracy, vibrant sophisticated Renaissance oil painting colors, 8K ultra detailed fabric textures and architectural details, square composition perfect for Instagram, luxury cultural travel aesthetic

alternative_prompts.option_1_duomo_square: Luxury travel photography, 1:1 square, golden hour, Duomo with Brunelleschi's dome centered, red terracotta and marble, Renaissance figures in 1504 fashion foreground, Tuscan colors, medium format, sfumato style, National Geographic, 8K detailed, Instagram optimized
alternative_prompts.option_2_david_square: Cultural travel editorial, 1:1 square, Palazzo Vecchio with David statue, Renaissance crowd in velvet period costume, ochre architecture, golden light, Leonardo sfumato, Tuscan palette, aspirational mood, 8K ultra detailed, square Instagram format
alternative_prompts.option_3_portrait_square: High-end cultural photography, 1:1 square, Renaissance woman portrait in 1504 velvet gown with slashed sleeves, Florence architecture background, golden hour, chiaroscuro, Botticelli aesthetic, professional color grading, 8K detailed, Instagram perfect

instagram_tips: Square format perfect for Renaissance architectural symmetry
Centered composition emphasizes Renaissance mathematical proportions
Cultural travel content highly shareable on Instagram
